open.speaker: Maya
open.text: New case. It... connects to the last one. What you decided then shapes what's here now.

variants.text: Because you ruled she was not alone, there is now a second subject to find. The visitor has a record. Follow it.
You deleted the contradiction last time. So there is no visitor to find — only the hole where one used to be. The case is the hole.
You archived it as recorded: she died alone. The Archive accepts this. There is little left to investigate — which is its own kind of answer.
We haven't reconstructed the prior afternoon yet. Come back to this once we have.

eden.text: Confirmed: this case state is a direct consequence of decision case_01. The record is negotiated, not fixed. Vol-rule observed.

end.speaker: Maya
end.text: That's all I can stage for you right now. The next memory isn't reconstructed yet.
